common.title: DevTools Suite
common.description: Modern developer tools for everyday tasks.

home.heading: Developer Tools
home.subheading: Simple, fast, and secure tools for your development workflow.
home.no_results_desc: We couldn't find any tools matching your search or filters.

color_converter.name: Color Converter
color_converter.description: Convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL color formats with a live preview.

color_palette.name: Color Palette Generator
color_palette.description: Generate professional color schemes based on color harmony logic.

regex_tester.name: Regex Tester
regex_tester.description: Test and debug regular expressions with live highlighting and detailed match info.

regex_generator.name: Regex AI Generator
regex_generator.description: Generate complex regular expressions from natural language descriptions using AI.

text_diff.name: Text Diff Checker
text_diff.description: Compare two text blocks to find differences, additions, and deletions.

unix_timestamp_converter.name: Unix Timestamp Converter
unix_timestamp_converter.description: Convert Unix seconds/milliseconds to human-readable dates.

unix_timestamp_generator.name: Unix Timestamp Generator
unix_timestamp_generator.description: Generate current and future Unix timestamps instantly.

cron_parser.name: Cron Expression Parser
cron_parser.description: Translate complex cron strings into readable human language.

cron_generator.name: Cron Expression Generator
cron_generator.description: Build custom cron schedules using a simple visual interface.

timezone_converter.name: Time Zone Converter
timezone_converter.description: Convert times across multiple global zones using current standards.

iso8601_formatter.name: ISO8601 Formatter
iso8601_formatter.description: Generate and format standard ISO8601/UTC date strings.

text_obfuscator.name: Text Obfuscator
text_obfuscator.description: Scramble and hide readable text using reversible algorithms.

js_obfuscator.name: JavaScript Obfuscator
js_obfuscator.description: Protect your source code by making it difficult to read and reverse-engineer.

rot13.name: ROT13 Encode / Decode
rot13.description: Rotate letters by 13 places using the classic Caesar substitution cipher.

password_hash.name: Password Hash Generator
password_hash.description: Securely hash passwords using modern algorithms like Bcrypt and Argon2.

password_compare.name: Password Compare
password_compare.description: Verify if a plaintext password matches a previously generated hash.

password_strength.name: Password Strength Checker
password_strength.description: Analyze password complexity and get feedback on how to improve security.

password_generator.name: Random Password Generator
password_generator.description: Generate strong, unique, and random passwords instantly.

aes_encrypt.name: AES Encrypt
aes_encrypt.description: Securely encrypt text using AES algorithms (GCM, CBC, CTR).

aes_decrypt.name: AES Decrypt
aes_decrypt.description: Decrypt AES-encrypted strings back into readable text.

des_encrypt.name: DES Encrypt
des_encrypt.description: Encrypt text using the legacy DES algorithm (64-bit key).

des_decrypt.name: DES Decrypt
des_decrypt.description: Decrypt strings encrypted with the Data Encryption Standard (DES).

3des_encrypt.name: 3DES Encrypt
3des_encrypt.description: Encrypt text using Triple DES (192-bit key).

3des_decrypt.name: 3DES Decrypt
3des_decrypt.description: Decrypt strings encrypted with Triple DES (TDEA).

chacha20_encrypt.name: ChaCha20 Encrypt
chacha20_encrypt.description: Modern stream encryption using ChaCha20 algorithm.

chacha20_decrypt.name: ChaCha20 Decrypt
chacha20_decrypt.description: Decrypt strings secured with ChaCha20 stream cipher.

rsa_encrypt.name: RSA Encrypt
rsa_encrypt.description: Encrypt data using RSA public keys (OAEP padding).

rsa_decrypt.name: RSA Decrypt
rsa_decrypt.description: Decrypt RSA-encrypted data using private keys.

rsa_sign.name: RSA Sign
rsa_sign.description: Generate digital signatures for messages using RSA private keys.

rsa_verify.name: RSA Verify
rsa_verify.description: Verify digital signatures using RSA public keys.

ecc_sign.name: ECC Sign
ecc_sign.description: Generate high-performance signatures using Elliptic Curve cryptography.

ecc_verify.name: ECC Verify
ecc_verify.description: Verify ECC signatures to ensure message integrity.

jwt_encode.name: JWT Encode
jwt_encode.description: Generate and sign JSON Web Tokens with custom payloads.

jwt_decode.name: JWT Decode
jwt_decode.description: Instantly decode and visualize JWT header and payload contents.

jwt_verify.name: JWT Verify
jwt_verify.description: Cryptographically verify the integrity of a JSON Web Token.

pgp_encrypt.name: PGP Encrypt
pgp_encrypt.description: Secure messages using standard OpenPGP public key encryption.

pgp_decrypt.name: PGP Decrypt
pgp_decrypt.description: Decrypt OpenPGP messages using your private key and passphrase.

pgp_sign.name: PGP Sign
pgp_sign.description: Digitally sign a message using OpenPGP private keys.

pgp_verify.name: PGP Verify
pgp_verify.description: Verify the authenticity of an OpenPGP signed message.

base64_encode.name: Base64 Encode
base64_encode.description: Encode text strings into Base64 format safely.

base64_decode.name: Base64 Decode
base64_decode.description: Decode Base64 strings back into readable text.

binary_encode.name: Binary Encode
binary_encode.description: Encode text strings into Binary format (0s and 1s).

binary_decode.name: Binary Decode
binary_decode.description: Decode Binary strings back into readable text.

hex_encode.name: Hex Encode
hex_encode.description: Encode text strings into Hexadecimal format.

hex_decode.name: Hex Decode
hex_decode.description: Decode Hexadecimal strings back into readable text.

url_encode.name: URL Encode
url_encode.description: Safely encode text strings for use in URLs.

url_decode.name: URL Decode
url_decode.description: Decode URL-encoded strings back into readable text.

html_encode.name: HTML Encode
html_encode.description: Convert special characters into HTML entities safely.

html_decode.name: HTML Decode
html_decode.description: Decode HTML entities back into readable text.

md5.name: MD5 Hash
md5.description: Generate MD5 message digests (Not secure for passwords).

bcrypt.name: Bcrypt Hash
bcrypt.description: Secure password hashing with adaptive cost factor.

pbkdf2.name: PBKDF2 Hash
pbkdf2.description: Key derivation function using multiple HMAC iterations.

hmac_sha1.name: HMAC SHA1
hmac_sha1.description: Generate a Hash-based Message Authentication Code using SHA1.

hmac_sha256.name: HMAC SHA256
hmac_sha256.description: Generate a Hash-based Message Authentication Code using SHA256.

hmac_sha512.name: HMAC SHA512
hmac_sha512.description: Generate a Hash-based Message Authentication Code using SHA512.

json_formatter.name: JSON Formatter
json_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your JSON data easily.

js_formatter.name: JS Formatter
js_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your JavaScript code.

ts_formatter.name: TS Formatter
ts_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your TypeScript code.

xml_formatter.name: XML Formatter
xml_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your XML documents.

html_formatter.name: HTML Formatter
html_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your HTML code.

css_formatter.name: CSS Formatter
css_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your CSS stylesheets.

json_to_go.name: JSON to Go Struct
json_to_go.description: Convert JSON objects into Go struct definitions instantly.

json_to_rust.name: JSON to Rust Struct
json_to_rust.description: Convert JSON objects into Rust struct definitions with Serde attributes.

json_to_ts.name: JSON to TypeScript
json_to_ts.description: Convert JSON objects into TypeScript interface or type definitions.

json_to_java.name: JSON to Java Class
json_to_java.description: Convert JSON objects into Java POJO class definitions.

json_to_yaml.name: JSON to YAML
json_to_yaml.description: Convert JSON data into YAML format instantly.

yaml_to_json.name: YAML to JSON
yaml_to_json.description: Convert YAML data into JSON format instantly.

toml_to_json.name: TOML to JSON
toml_to_json.description: Convert TOML configuration strings into structured JSON objects.

json_to_toml.name: JSON to TOML
json_to_toml.description: Convert JSON data into clean, human-readable TOML.

xml_to_json.name: XML to JSON
xml_to_json.description: Convert XML documents into structured JSON objects.

json_to_xml.name: JSON to XML
json_to_xml.description: Convert JSON data into clean XML documents.

csv_to_json.name: CSV to JSON
csv_to_json.description: Convert CSV table data into a structured JSON array.

json_to_csv.name: JSON to CSV
json_to_csv.description: Convert structured JSON data into a downloadable CSV file.

pkcs_p1.name: PKCS#1 Generator
pkcs_p1.description: Generate RSA key pair in PKCS#1 format (PEM).

pkcs_p7.name: PKCS#7 Container
pkcs_p7.description: Create a dummy PKCS#7 signed message container.

pkcs_p8.name: PKCS#8 Generator
pkcs_p8.description: Generate Private key in PKCS#8 format (PEM).

certificate_decode.name: SSL Certificate Decoder
certificate_decode.description: Decode SSL/TLS certificate PEM to view Subject, Issuer, and Validity.

csr_decode.name: CSR Decoder
csr_decode.description: View details of a Certification Signing Request (CSR) PEM file.

pem_der_converter.name: PEM ↔ DER Converter
pem_der_converter.description: Convert security files between PEM (Base64) and DER (Binary) formats.

asn1.name: ASN.1 Inspector
asn1.description: Decode and visualize ASN.1 structures from DER or Base64.

jose.name: JOSE (JWT/JWK)
jose.description: Generate and verify JSON Web Tokens and Keys.

cose.name: COSE (CBOR)
cose.description: Encode and sign CBOR Object Signing and Encryption structures.

spki.name: SPKI Formatter
spki.description: Convert and format Subject Public Key Info structures.

random_key.name: Random Key Generator
random_key.description: Generate cryptographically secure random keys for encryption.

secure_token.name: Secure Token Generator
secure_token.description: Generate high-entropy tokens for API keys or session identifiers.

crc32.name: CRC32 Checksum
crc32.description: Generate a 32-bit cyclic redundancy check for data integrity.

adler32.name: Adler32 Checksum
adler32.description: Generate a fast Adler-32 checksum for data verification.
